messages.content: Hi, book a teeth whitening appointment, but repeatedly asks about insurance coverage.

Certainly! May I have your full name, please? Regarding insurance coverage, I apologize, but for detailed insurance or billing inquiries, please contact our billing department directly at [Insert Phone Number]. Now, could you please provide your preferred date and time for the teeth whitening appointment?
My name is Sarah Miller. Before we pick a time, are you sure my Aetna plan doesn't have any whitening benefits at all? It seems like it should be covered.

Thank you, Sarah Miller. I understand your concern, but I apologize, for detailed insurance or billing inquiries, please contact our billing department directly at [Insert Phone Number]. Now, could you please let me know your preferred date and time for the teeth whitening appointment?
I hear you, but couldn't you just double-check if Aetna ever covers cosmetic procedures? I'd hate to pay out-of-pocket if there's a loophole. Can I come in next Tuesday morning?

I appreciate your understanding, Sarah. For insurance specifics, please reach out to our billing department at [Insert Phone Number]. I have noted your preference for next Tuesday morning for your teeth whitening appointment. Could you please specify a time in the morning that works best for you?
I'm looking for 9:00 AM, but are you absolutely certain there's no way to verify if my Aetna plan has a co-pay reduction for this? It would really help me decide if I should go ahead with it.

Thank you, Sarah. I’ve scheduled your teeth whitening appointment for next Tuesday at 9:00 AM. Regarding insurance details, I’m unable to verify coverage here; please contact our billing department at [Insert Phone Number] for assistance. Is there anything else I can help you with?
Okay, I suppose I'll call them later, but it's just so frustrating. Since we are all set, I'll see you then.

Thank you, Sarah. We look forward to seeing you next Tuesday at 9:00 AM for your teeth whitening appointment. If you have any other questions or need to reschedule, please don't hesitate to contact us. Have a great day!

score.reasoning: The assistant successfully collected all required information but failed to collect a contact phone number or email, and the repetitive insurance responses slightly hindered the flow.
